title: serverless_function
description: One serverless function — one record per AWS Lambda function, GCP Cloud Function, or Azure Function. Policies check VPC placement, tracing, and environment variable encryption.

provider.description: Cloud provider short name: aws, gcp, azure.

runtime.description: Runtime language and version (e.g. nodejs18.x, python3.11).

is_in_vpc.description: Function is deployed inside a VPC.

tracing_enabled.description: Distributed tracing (X-Ray, Cloud Trace) is enabled.

reserved_concurrency_set.description: Reserved concurrency limit is configured (prevents resource exhaustion).

environment_variables_encrypted.description: Environment variables are encrypted with a customer-managed key.
